# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2026-03-22

### Added
- Initial release
- Core Converter class with plugin system
- BasePlugin for basic HTML handling
- CommonMarkPlugin for CommonMark specification support
- Support for:
  - Bold and italic text
  - Headings (h1-h6)
  - Paragraphs
  - Links and images
  - Lists (ordered and unordered)
  - Blockquotes
  - Code (inline and blocks)
  - Line breaks and horizontal rules
- Smart escaping mode
- Domain option for resolving relative URLs
- TypeScript support with full type definitions
- Comprehensive examples
